heading: This Afternoon
text: Variable clouds. Highs from the mid 40s to around 50 south, and upper 30s to mid 40s north, with some mid 30s far north. West to northwest winds 5 to 10 mph.

heading: Tonight
text: Cloudy. Chance of rain or snow showers south of Route 4, likely to the north, with some brief freezing rain possible near the international border. Lows in the upper 20s to lower 30s north, and mid to upper 30s in the south. Winds becoming south to southeast around 5 mph.

heading: Thursday
text: Mostly cloudy. Scattered rain showers in the south; scattered snow or rain showers north, changing to rain showers. Highs in the mid to upper 50s in the south, and mid 40s to lower 50s north, with some lower 40s northeast. South to southeast winds 5 to 15 mph, becoming southwest.
